log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Locathah — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 17
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:13+9=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Locathah — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Locathah — Unarmored Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
